trans-unit.source: Bookings
A maximum of %s tickets can be booked per booking.
Each participant may bring up to %s escorts.
A booking has already been made using the email address "%s". Please use another email address.
Please enter a positive number.
There are not enough spots left. Please reduce the number of tickets, if possible.
There are not enough spots left. Please reduce the number of tickets or add your booking to the waiting list.
There are not enough spots left on the waiting list. Please reduce the number of tickets, if possible.
The event and the waiting list are both fully booked.
Only booking on the waiting list is still possible. Please select the option "On waiting list" if you would like to be added.
The event is not bookable.
The event is not accessible.
Unfortunately, the event is already fully booked. If you submit the form, your booking will be placed on the waiting list.
Booking is open. Free spots are available.
Booking is only possible starting from %s.
The booking period for this event has expired. Unfortunately, bookings can no longer be accepted.
Sorry, this event is fully booked.
The booking period end date has been adjusted.
This unsubscription limit is too far in the future (check the event’s start and end dates).
You cannot set both an unsubscription limit in days before the event and a fixed limit. Please set the day limit to 0 or delete the fixed date.
